response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the song '炎夏' (Enka) reference lyrics and the narrative storytelling description. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized song lyrics and narrative summaries. Manual transcription and translation applied for the outro talk. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed song lyrics to vocal bursts; timed narrative lines to match both voiceover and prominent visual text (burnt-in subtitles) which served as the primary fallback for translation.

subtitles.original: だから ENCOUNT!
subtitles.english: So ENCOUNT!

subtitles.original: 悲劇ぶった天国へ
subtitles.english: Into a tragic heaven

subtitles.original: 不甲斐ない瞳
subtitles.english: With worthless eyes

subtitles.original: きっと、あの日みつめた貴方のせいだ
subtitles.english: It's surely the fault of you, who I stared at that day

subtitles.original: はやく、はやく... はやく息をとめて
subtitles.english: Hurry, hurry... Hurry and hold your breath

subtitles.original: 淡い淡い水面のむこうへと
subtitles.english: Towards the beyond of the faint, faint water surface

subtitles.original: 白い光をみつめていると
subtitles.english: When staring at the white light,

subtitles.original: 急な痛みに襲われる
subtitles.english: A sudden pain attacks me.

subtitles.original: 僕は私を保っていられなくなること
subtitles.english: That I will no longer be able to maintain myself...

subtitles.original: それをこの小さな器(からだ)が証明している
subtitles.english: This tiny vessel proves it.

subtitles.original: はじめに、安堵するきみがみたい
subtitles.english: First, I want to see you feel relieved.

subtitles.original: つぎに、きたいしたい
subtitles.english: Next, I want to hope.

subtitles.original: この場所で戦いなど起こっていない。
subtitles.english: There was no major battle here.

subtitles.original: 少なくともこの世界線では...
subtitles.english: At least not in this timeline...

subtitles.original: だが探偵には分かっていた。
subtitles.english: But the detective knows...

subtitles.original: 彼女が見たものは決して夢ではないことを。
subtitles.english: ...what she saw was no dream.

subtitles.original: 心の中にはまだ殺戮の匂いが漂っている。
subtitles.english: The smell of the carnage still lingers in her mind.

subtitles.original: かつての彼女にまとわりついていた、あの匂い。
subtitles.english: It's a scent that was, at one time, so familiar to her.

subtitles.original: 探偵としての生活も今では順調だが、
subtitles.english: That stench would still linger on her...

subtitles.original: そうでなければあの匂いからは離れることができなかったでしょう。
subtitles.english: ...if the detective's life didn't take a turn for the better.

subtitles.original: 今でも...あの頃の日々がリアルな夢のようにまとわりつく。
subtitles.english: Even now... her days felt more like the real dream.

subtitles.original: 終わるべくして終わったおとぎ話。
subtitles.english: A fairytale. Maybe one that deserved to end.

subtitles.original: どこまで行っても彼女は、生まれ持った本質から逃れることはできない。
subtitles.english: Because, at the end of the day, she can never run away from her nature.

subtitles.original: それでも今は違う。今の彼女には仲間がいる。
subtitles.english: But she's not just that anymore. She has friends to thank for that.

subtitles.original: それが、別の世界線の彼女とは違う点なのかもしれない。
subtitles.english: Maybe that was what separated her from the other version.

subtitles.original: もしかしたらあの子は、幸せに生きることのできた世界線があったのだろうかと、
subtitles.english: And, maybe... that version of herself just wanted a ray of hope,

subtitles.original: そんな一筋の希望を求めていたのだろうか。
subtitles.english: ...to know that there was one timeline where things worked out.

subtitles.original: そしてその幸せな世界線というのは、ここではないまた別の世界線のことかもしれない...
subtitles.english: Or perhaps this was never about the detective...

subtitles.original: 考えが頭を巡るものの、答えが出ることはない。
subtitles.english: So many thoughts run amok inside her head, but they're forever left unanswered.

subtitles.original: 何にせよ、探偵は自身の血塗られた過去を忘れることはないでしょう。
subtitles.english: Whatever the case, the detective won't forget her bloody past,

subtitles.original: しかしまた後戻りするつもりもない。
subtitles.english: But she isn't going to revert to it either.

subtitles.original: 彼女はこれからも仲間とともに進む。
subtitles.english: She will continue to move forward with her friends,

subtitles.original: 望んだ結末を迎えられなかった別の自分達のためにも。
subtitles.english: And for all the variants who didn't get their desired ending.

subtitles.original: 探偵アーニャ・メルフィッサは、
subtitles.english: The detective, Anya Melfissa,

subtitles.original: 明日に向かって生き続ける。
subtitles.english: Will keep on living for her own tomorrow.

subtitles.original: Anya Melfissa Birthday Live 2026!
subtitles.english: Anya Melfissa Birthday Live 2026!

subtitles.original: How did everyone like it? Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: How did everyone like it? Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: やっと今年も参りました、アーニャの誕生日です！
subtitles.english: Finally, it's here again this year, Anya's birthday!

subtitles.original: いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How did you all like it?

subtitles.original: This time, I tried to incorporate a little bit of story into my 3D birthday celebration.
subtitles.english: This time, I tried to incorporate a little bit of story into my 3D birthday celebration.

subtitles.original: And I think it turned out pretty nice, you know?
subtitles.english: And I think it turned out pretty nice, you know?

subtitles.original: You get story part and also live part,
subtitles.english: You get story part and also live part,

subtitles.original: and I think it turned out pretty well.
subtitles.english: And I think it turned out pretty well.

subtitles.original: And also, how was my new original song? Oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: And also, how was my new original song? Oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: How was my new original song? It was good, wasn't it? I hope you all liked it!
subtitles.english: How was my new original song? It was good, wasn't it? I hope you all liked it!

subtitles.original: 新曲もね、あの、歌わせていただきました。
subtitles.english: I got to sing my new song too.

subtitles.original: いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How did you all like it?
